Subject: Request to Extend Contract-Review Deadline

Dear [Opposing Counsel],

I hope this message finds you well. I am writing to request a brief extension of our current contract-review deadline by one week. A few scheduling conflicts on my end have made it difficult to give the document the careful attention it deserves, and I would like to ensure that my response reflects the thorough review the matter warrants.

I apologize for any inconvenience this may cause and am happy to discuss an alternative timeline that works for both sides. Please let me know at your earliest convenience whether a one-week extension would be acceptable, and I will confirm the new deadline in writing once agreed.

Best regards,
[Your Name]
